name: Demo: Rx Demo K3s Deploy
description: Apply the rx-demo lab overlay to k3s, pin workloads to the registry image tag, wait for rollout, and prove the Kubernetes path matches the Docker Compose app outcome.
notes: Planned/demo lane for the registry-based deployment. The older rx-demo-k3s-app-refresh executor remains the current BKC runnable bridge for the earlier rx-ui image import path.
